pool.baseline: idk i just feel like everything is so incredibly pointless. like we’re just these tiny accidents of biology on a rock flying through a vacuum. no matter what i do or how hard i try, the universe doesn't care. it’s all just noise. does any of it actually matter to you? or is it all just a simulation of meaning?
